expressions.suspect:renard_voss: Renard Voss signed the station ledger in a tight hand. His coat hem is damp with platform mist.
expressions.suspect:estranged_daughter: A young woman waited at platform two with a small bouquet. The stems are wrapped in railway paper.
expressions.suspect:stationmaster: The stationmaster's name is on duty for the 11pm watch. His brass watch chain is tucked away.
expressions.suspect:night_porter: The night porter carries a brass key ring with three keys missing. His boots are clean of coal dust.
expressions.suspect:platform_guard: The platform guard's lantern hook is empty. His gloves are dry despite the fog.
expressions.suspect:railway_clerk: The railway clerk has fresh ink on two fingers. His cuffs are neatly folded back.
expressions.suspect:travelling_broker: A broker in a grey coat waited in the lounge. His ticket is first class and unused.
expressions.location:thornfield_crossing: Thornfield Crossing is a two-platform junction with a single office door. The clock above the gate shows 11:07.
expressions.location:platform_two: Platform two is lit by three lamps. The far bench is wet.
expressions.location:platform_one: Platform one faces the signal box. A luggage cart blocks the east end.
expressions.location:station_office: The station office has one desk and a locked cabinet. The window latch is unfastened.
expressions.location:signal_box: The signal box lever for the siding is down. A mug of cold tea sits by the panel.
expressions.location:waiting_room: The waiting room stove is cold. Two chairs are pulled close together.
expressions.location:goods_shed: The goods shed floor is dusted with coal. A crate lid is ajar.
expressions.location:carriage_siding: The carriage siding holds one empty carriage. The steps are damp.
expressions.object:telegram: A folded telegram lies on the office desk. The seal is broken and the paper is creased.
expressions.object:cipher_sheet: A cipher sheet is pinned beneath the blotter. Several columns are marked in pencil.
expressions.object:satchel: A brown satchel rests by the bench. The clasp bears the initials RV in brass.
expressions.object:initialed_cufflink: A cufflink with the letters RV is on the office floor. The hinge is bent.
expressions.object:station_key: A heavy station key sits in the drawer. Its tag reads OFFICE.
expressions.object:ledger_book: The ledger book is open to the accounts page. A line of figures is crossed through.
expressions.object:sealed_envelope: A sealed envelope is tucked inside the ledger. The wax is stamped with a crest.
expressions.object:cash_tin: A cash tin is half full of coins. The lid shows a fresh scrape.
expressions.object:platform_lantern: A platform lantern is unlit on the bench. The wick is trimmed short.
expressions.object:torn_ticket: A torn ticket half is pinned to the wall board. The date reads 12 November.
expressions.object:telegraph_form: A telegraph form lies in the waste bin. The message lines are blank.
expressions.object:ink_blotter: The ink blotter is damp on one corner. The blot has a sharp edge.
expressions.object:coal_dust: Coal dust is scattered on the platform steps. The pattern forms a clear shoe print.
expressions.emotion:fixed_stare: She did not look at the body. She looked at the track beyond.
expressions.emotion:avoided_contact: He answered without meeting the inspector's eyes. His gaze stayed on the timetable.
expressions.emotion:measured_breath: Her breathing slowed as questions were asked. The reply came after two beats.
expressions.emotion:steady_hands: His hands did not shake while handing over the keys. The ring did not jingle.
expressions.emotion:paused_reply: A pause came before the time was given. The answer was short and exact.
expressions.emotion:closed_posture: Arms were kept close to the body. The coat remained fastened indoors.
expressions.modifier:initialed_RV: The initials RV appear on two separate items. The lettering is the same style.
expressions.modifier:paid_off: Coins were found stacked in a neat column. The stack does not match the till count.
expressions.modifier:unlocked: The office latch turns without resistance. The lock shows no tool marks.
expressions.modifier:misplaced: An item rests where it would not be left in routine use. The placement blocks a clear path.
expressions.modifier:unclaimed: No name is written on the property tag. The string is newly tied.
expressions.modifier:smudged: A line of ink is smudged at the margin. The smear runs left to right.
expressions.modifier:damp: Moisture beads on the paper edge. The rest of the sheet is dry.
expressions.modifier:late_arrival: The register shows a signature after the last arrival time. The ink is fresh.
expressions.modifier:lamps_dimmed: The platform lamps burn lower than usual. The glass is clean.
expressions.modifier:ticket_punched: The ticket is punched twice in the same place. The second punch is deeper.
expressions.action:office_entered: The office door was used; the hinge oil is disturbed. A footprint marks the mat.
expressions.action:telegram_handled: The telegram is unfolded and refolded. A thumbprint sits near the code header.
expressions.action:satchel_swapped: Two satchels were present; one is missing. The strap buckle is left behind.
expressions.action:ledger_checked: The ledger has a new crease at the fraud column. The page corner is bent.
expressions.action:platform_crossed: Footprints cross from platform one to two. The prints are over fresh dust.
expressions.action:signal_paused: The signal lever was held at danger. The chalk mark is erased.
expressions.action:guard_bribed: A coin pouch was found under the guard's bench. The string is untied.
expressions.action:door_left_open: The office door was left ajar. The latch is not fully seated.
expressions.action:footsteps_faded: Footsteps lead from the bench into fog. The trail ends at the platform edge.
expressions.time:between_trains: The interval between the last and first trains is thirty-two minutes. No passenger traffic occurs in that span.
expressions.time:last_arrival: The last train arrived at 10:58. The platform cleared by 11:03.
expressions.time:first_departure: The first morning departure is listed at 11:30. The signal is set at 11:25.
expressions.time:fog_thickens: Fog thickened after the last arrival. Visibility reduced to ten yards.
expressions.time:signal_reset: The signal was reset at 11:24. The lever shows a fresh grease mark.
expressions.motive:fraud_concealment: The telegram contains proof of systematic fraud. The names are written in full.
expressions.motive:third_party_link: A third party of social standing is named in the cipher. The name is underlined.
expressions.motive:partnership_ruin: The partnership accounts show a final deficit. The balance would end the firm.
expressions.motive:ledger_exposure: A ledger column titled dividends does not match the receipts. The discrepancy is dated.
expressions.motive:debt_pressure: A promissory note is clipped inside the ledger. The due date is past.
expressions.motive:sealed_proof: The sealed proof is addressed to authorities. The seal is intact but warm.
expressions.witness:ticket_clerk: The ticket clerk recorded a late punch. The log notes platform two.
expressions.witness:porter: The porter moved luggage at 11:05. His cart track ends by the bench.
expressions.witness:signalman: The signalman logged a pause at 11:12. The entry is initialed.
expressions.witness:carriage_cleaner: The carriage cleaner wiped the siding steps at 11:15. The rag is still damp.
expressions.witness:telegraph_operator: The telegraph operator handled a blank form at 11:02. The tray is empty now.
expressions.event:aldous_verne_discovered: Aldous Verne was found on platform two. His watch stopped at 11:16.
expressions.event:platform_two_scene: Platform two was cleared after the last arrival. Only one suitcase remained.
expressions.event:window_between_trains: The thirty-two minute window between trains is recorded. The office was unoccupied then.
